tasks.label: 👋 Welcome
args: if [ -n "$REMOTE_CONTAINERS" ]; then exit 0; elif [ -f .venv/bin/activate ]; then cat scripts/dev/next_steps.txt; else cat scripts/dev/welcome_message.txt; fi

tasks.label: 🐳 Check Docker Status
tasks.detail: Verify Docker is installed and running before executing Docker commands

tasks.label: 🚀 HA: Start (Fresh)
tasks.detail: Start HA if needed, restart if running

tasks.label: ⏹️ HA: Stop
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml down && echo '✅ Home Assistant stopped'

tasks.label: 🗑️ HA: Clean All Data (Reset)
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml down -v && docker run --rm -v "$(pwd)/test-ha-config:/data" alpine rm -rf /data/* /data/.[!.]* 2>/dev/null; echo '✅ All Home Assistant data cleaned'

tasks.label: 🔎 HA: Check Integration Status
tasks.command: docker exec ha-cable-modem-test bash -c 'echo "=== Integration Files ==="; ls -la /config/custom_components/cable_modem_monitor/ 2>&1 | head -10; echo ""; echo "=== Recent Integration Logs ==="; grep -i cable_modem /config/home-assistant.log 2>&1 | tail -10 || echo "No logs found (HA may not have started yet)"'
tasks.detail: Check if the integration is loaded and view any errors

tasks.label: 🛠️ HA: Fix Port Conflicts
tasks.detail: Stop any processes using port 8123 and clean up containers

tasks.label: 🩺 HA: Diagnose Port 8123
tasks.command: echo '=== Checking what is using port 8123 ===' && echo '' && echo 'Method 1: lsof' && sudo lsof -i :8123 2>/dev/null || echo 'No results from lsof' && echo '' && echo 'Method 2: netstat' && sudo netstat -tulpn 2>/dev/null | grep 8123 || echo 'No results from netstat' && echo '' && echo 'Method 3: ss' && sudo ss -tulpn 2>/dev/null | grep 8123 || echo 'No results from ss' && echo '' && echo '=== Docker containers ===' && docker ps -a && echo '' && echo '=== Docker networks ===' && docker network ls
tasks.detail: Show detailed info about what's using port 8123

tasks.label: 🚀 Quick Validation (Pre-commit)
tasks.detail: Lint & format check (auto-installs tools if missing)

tasks.label: 🔌 Check Extension Conflicts
tasks.command: echo '🔌 Checking VSCode extensions...' && echo '' && echo 'Recommended extensions: 10' && echo 'Unwanted extensions: 7' && echo '' && echo 'If you have conflicting extensions installed, please disable them for this workspace.' && echo 'See .vscode/extensions.json for details.'

tasks.label: 🔄 Fresh Start (Reset VS Code State)
tasks.detail: Reset VS Code state to test new developer experience (testing only)

tasks.label: 🔒 Reconfigure Git Email Privacy
tasks.detail: Reconfigure git email (automatically done during initial setup)

tasks.label: 🔧 Fix Dev Container (Reinstall Dependencies)
tasks.detail: Re-run post-create setup if tools like ruff/black are missing

tasks.label: 🚀 Create Release
tasks.detail: Automate version bumping, tagging, and release creation

tasks.label: 📹 Capture Modem Traffic
tasks.detail: Launch browser to capture modem traffic (uses har-capture)
